title: 美食微距特写主图
prompt_template: An ultra-close macro shot of {food_name}, shot with 100mm macro lens at f/4 for shallow depth of field. Steam rising from the food, glistening oil texture, scattered fresh ingredients ({specific_ingredients}) around the main subject, dark moody background (deep charcoal #1A1A1A), directional warm side light from the left creating dramatic highlights on the food surface, water droplets on the surface for freshness, professional food photography for premium e-commerce listing, hyper-detailed texture, 1024x1024.
